name: Resonance Hyderabad

co-ed day scholar, SAT / global (JEE Adv + SAT/AP/IELTS)

campusCountNote: 34 campuses across Hyderabad — co-ed day scholar hubs plus separate boys' and girls' residential campuses. Give the parent the campus nearest their area.

MPC + JEE (Main & Advanced).feePerYear: Day scholar: ₹1,60,000 (year 1) + ₹1,70,000 (year 2) = ₹3,30,000 total for two years. Residential: ₹2,60,000 + ₹2,80,000 = ₹5,40,000 total.
MPC + JEE (Main & Advanced).note: Flagship integrated Intermediate MPC with full IIT-JEE Main + Advanced coaching, DPPs, All India Test Series, SAPER reports

MPC + JEE (Main only).feePerYear: Day scholar: ₹3,00,000 total for two years (₹1,45,000 + ₹1,55,000). Residential: ₹5,00,000 total.
MPC + JEE (Main only).note: Intermediate MPC focused on JEE Main / EAPCET for engineering seats

MPC + JEE Advanced + SAT (Global).feePerYear: Day scholar: ₹5,90,000 total for two years. Residential: ₹8,10,000 total. Available at the Global Campus, Madhapur.
MPC + JEE Advanced + SAT (Global).note: For students targeting international universities — combines JEE Advanced with SAT / AP / IELTS and BITSAT/EAPCET safety nets

BiPC + NEET.feePerYear: Day scholar: ₹3,00,000 total for two years (₹1,45,000 + ₹1,55,000). Residential: ₹5,00,000 total.
BiPC + NEET.note: Integrated Intermediate BiPC with NEET/AIIMS coaching, NCERT-line teaching, botany/zoology labs

Long-term (Repeaters / droppers).feePerYear: ₹99,000 to ₹1,58,000 for one intensive year (day scholar); residential scales up proportionately.
Long-term (Repeaters / droppers).note: One-year compressed program for 12th-pass repeaters to maximise JEE/NEET scores

Distance / Online (DLPD).feePerYear: Live online JEE Main ₹46,000-₹50,000/year; JEE Advanced ₹76,000-₹80,000/year; Study-Material Package ₹17,000-₹24,500; All India Test Series ₹4,000-₹6,500.
Distance / Online (DLPD).note: For students who cannot attend a physical campus — live classes, AITS, MAHAPACK study material

hostel.feePerYear: ₹1,05,000 per year (₹2,10,000 for the full two-year program) — this is the residential premium over the day-scholar fee.
hostel.note: Covers hostel admission, seat rent, mess (veg & non-veg), library, internal exams and sports. Separate high-security boys' and girls' campuses with warden supervision; fees include 18% GST

results.brandWide: Resonance nationally: 52,000+ IIT qualifiers since 2002 (originally founded in Kota, 2001).
results.hyderabad2025: Hyderabad campuses (2024-25): 181 IIT selections, 275 NIT/IIIT/BITS seats, 76 MBBS seats. Telangana EAPCET: 322 seats in the top-10 colleges, 712 in the top-30, and 443 students in the state top-10 of the TG Intermediate board. Elite ranks: Abhinav Chitturi AIR 11 in JEE Advanced 2026 (17 Hyderabad students under AIR 1000); Kakarla Jeevan Sai Kumar AIR 18 in NEET UG 2025 (Telugu states topper).

batchSize: 40 to 60 students per section — deliberately much smaller than Narayana/Sri Chaitanya (80-120), so every child gets daily doubt-clearing, Daily Practice Problems (DPPs) and a personal SAPER performance report (the 'RESO Way').
scholarships: Scholarships are decided by the ResoNET / MegaResoFAST entrance test and apply to the TUITION component only (hostel, study material and infrastructure fees are separate). Standard tuition-waiver slabs by test score: 95%+ = 100%; 90-95% = 75%; 85-90% = 60%; 80-85% = 50%; 75-80% = 30%; 50-75% = 10%. Alternative merit paths: Class-X board 95%+ = 100% waiver or a flat ₹40,000 concession (sliding down to ₹10,000 for 80-85%); Olympiad Stage III = 100%, Stage II = 90%, Stage I = 75%; KVPY final = 50%, NTSE Level II = 40%. Demographic concessions: children of Defence/paramilitary = 40%, wards of single mothers = 50%, sibling discount 10-25%. Earlier admission earns a larger scholarship — the concession value decreases month by month from September to April, so booking early secures a lower net fee. Give an exact slab only if the parent tells you the child's test score or board %; otherwise offer to book the ResoNET test.
admissionProcess: Admission is by the 3-stage Resonance Eligibility Test (RET), not just fee payment. Stage 1: foundational screening (NCERT-based, online or offline, need 75% to advance). Stage 2: advanced analytical written test (need 75%). Stage 3: one-on-one personal evaluation with senior faculty. Register at apply.resonancehyderabad.com. Scholarship % comes from the ResoNET/MegaResoFAST score. Fees can be paid lump-sum (₹5,000 discount) or in 2-3 installments (a large first installment at admission, balance within ~60 days).

contact.office: Head office & admissions: Kavuri Hills, Madhapur. Admissions +91 91212 19858, email admissions@resonancehyderabad.com. 34 campuses across Hyderabad.

faq.Batch size: 40 to 60 students per section — far smaller than the 80-120 at Narayana or Sri Chaitanya, so your child gets real personal attention.
faq.SAT / global program: Available at the Global Campus, Madhapur — MPC + JEE Advanced + SAT/AP/IELTS for students targeting international universities.
faq.Repeaters / droppers: Yes — a one-year intensive long-term program for 12th-pass repeaters, ₹99,000 to ₹1,58,000 as a day scholar.
faq.Distance / online: DLPD live online classes, All India Test Series, and study-material packages for JEE and NEET.
faq.GST: Fees are inclusive of 18% GST, as required by government rules for coaching.
faq.Lump-sum discount: A flat ₹5,000 off if you pay the full fee at once instead of in installments.
faq.Registration: Apply at apply.resonancehyderabad.com or just call the admissions office and we'll guide you.
faq.Parent updates: Continuous evaluation with Daily Practice Problems, weekly-style tests and personal SAPER performance reports.

compliance.brandAuthorizedNote: Set true only after Resonance gives written permission to call parents under their brand. Internal testing / pitch demo until then.
compliance.note: Leads are existing enquiries (walk-ins, website forms, referrals), not cold DND-registry calls. Avg call ~7 min, up to 15 for hot leads.
